description: Style NoteKeep cool on a sunny day and get that sporty look with this basics cap. Styled as a classic baseball cap it will keep you looking effortlessly stylish on your day out.They come in a variety of designs that are sure to take your fancy and the material is light and breathableProduct DetailsRed baseball capStitched branding on the frontHas branding at the backHas a black adjustable strap and a ripped embellishment on the visorMaterial and CareBlended fabricMachine wash in cold water or hand wash separatelyDo not use softeners or bleachTumble dry on lowCool iron; Do not iron on designDo not dry cleanSize and FitFree size
